title.headline: Tokenizer Performance Comparison
title.subtitle: Compiler-first span board for the wider gen1 contract.

primary.label: Baseline path
primary.caption: higher span
primary.note: Tokenizer Performance Comparison keeps one high-side reference legible.

secondary.label: Constrained path
secondary.caption: closer floor
secondary.note: Tokenizer Performance Comparison also keeps the lower-floor comparison visible.

axis.label: Comparison axis
axis.note: tokenizer_performance_comparison holds the same board family while the copy changes.

annotation.label: Tradeoff
annotation.note: Tokenizer Performance Comparison is treated as one broader comparison case.

floor.note: The family should show one shared floor and two different spans.

thesis.title: Tokenizer Performance Comparison
thesis.line_1: Broader training needs one stable comparison family with externalized values.
thesis.line_2: The model should learn the board structure, not memorize raw SVG geometry.

summary.conclusion: Comparison seeds are now generated compiler-first for broader training.
